test.description: Regression test for https://github.com/maplibre/maplibre-gl-js/issues/7704 (line-pattern variant). A line with a top-level zoom `step` whose branches each contain a feature-dependent `case`. The feature reference makes the expression composite (data-driven), routing through `CrossFadedPatternBinder` rather than the constant uniform path. At zoom 10.5 (past the step), the line should render with `generic_metro`. Before the fix, the data-driven path swapped the cross-fade `from` and `to` attributes relative to the constant path, so the pre-step `generic_icon` was rendered instead.
